positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a graceful leaping fox against a solid, deep indigo background. The fox should be depicted with highly stylized, elegant silhouettes and flowing lines, evoking a sense of movement and freedom. Incorporate subtle floral trails or abstract geometric elements (like crescent moons or stylized constellations) encircling the fox's path to suggest magic and wonder. Composition should be centered and vertically balanced. Style: Japanese woodblock print meets modern linocut, high contrast, crisp black lines on a rich background color. Lighting: Flat, graphic, and dramatic. Color palette: Deep indigo (background), brilliant white and matte black (lines). Ideal for apparel screen printing, clean vector aesthetic, maximum detail and clarity.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noise, artifacts, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, excessive detail, messy, complex background, low resolution, bad anatomy, limbs
